summary: - **Status:** synthesis update, not an audit. This document supersedes `docs/next/feasibility-synthesis-v4.md` as the standing cross-experiment picture. It changes no frozen record, verdict, audit, result log, or registered assumption. - **Scope:** both programme theses—**CORRECTNESS** and **EFFICIENCY**—after the CASC-0′ result, the registered RULES-1 CPU certificate, the UFO-in-RDF-1.2 expressibility work, and construction of the ontology-import go/no-go. - **Central discipline:** neither thes
title: Cross-experiment feasibility synthesis v5 — after CASC-0′, the RULES-1 certificate, and the ontology build
